Power BI + Claude in VS Code — Runbook

Exact steps to connect Claude with Power BI PBIP files in VS Code.

Navigation

1Save as PBIP 2Check PBIP folder structure 3Install Claude Code extension 4Skip permissions 5Ask Claude to connect 6Confirm project setup
1

Save as PBIP

Open report in Power BI Desktop → File → Save as → Power BI project files (*.pbip) → Save.

2

Check PBIP folder structure

After saving, the main project folder must contain Report, SemanticModel, and the PBIP file.

3

Install Claude Code extension

In VS Code → Extensions → search Claude Code for VSCode → Install.

4

Skip permissions

Claude extension settings → enable Allow Dangerously Skip Permissions. Use only in trusted/internal workspace.

5

Ask Claude to connect

Keep the PBIP project open in Power BI Desktop. In Claude, ask it to connect to the opened Power BI project.

6

Confirm project setup

Check the project main folder. If .claude folder exists, Claude is setup with the project.

✓
Ready: ask Claude about Power BI metadata, pages, visuals, measures, model structure, performance, and documentation.
